title: Loot Bundle Bags
description: Adds Loot Bags to Vanilla Minecraft
body:
This datapack adds loot bags to minecraft, without the need of any client side additions, including resource packs.

This uses the new bundle item to do so.

By default, whenever a player kills a mob, there is a 2% chance for a bag to drop, and when this occures there is a 75% chance it will be a common one, a 20% chance of uncommon, and a 5% chance of a rare bag.

There are also 3 variations of the bags. There is an overworld, nether, and end variations for each tier.

When the bag is aquired, all one need do to open it, is "use" the item, as if you were going to throw its contents on the ground.
